subcodes.title: Interview with F. R. Hinkle of the Sacramento Union, 1912-10-25
subcodes.first_line: We have come here to this city to be your guests. We are Bahá’ís. We have come as travelers to see the various places in this country.
subcodes.subjects: @unity of governments; political unity, @unity; oneness of humanity, @supreme tribunal, @universal language, @harmony of science and religion, @the economic problem and its solution; voluntary giving, @religion as source of love and unity, @universal education, @justice ['adl]; social justice and divine justice, @independent investigation of truth; reality
